name: request-vm-ssh
description: Compute market requester: create RFPs, collect bids, provision VMs, SSH in

port.description: TCP port to listen on (omit to serve only through xrpc.fedproxy.com relay)

private-key-hex.description: Secp256k1 private key hex for the requester DID

private-key-hex-path.description: Path to load/save the Secp256k1 private key hex. Creates file with generated key if missing or empty. Overridden by --private-key-hex if both are set.

plc-directory-url.description: PLC directory URL for DID registration

fedproxy-host.description: FedProxy SSH-tunnel host where the guest publishes itself for SSH (vmName--did-plc-<key>.<fedproxy-host>)

label.description: Label for log and relay identification

bid-window-sec.description: Seconds to wait for bids after submitting RFP

exec.description: Program to run in the VM (for non-TTY sessions)

vm-ready-timeout-sec.description: Timeout in seconds waiting for VM SSH readiness

keep-vm.description: Keep VM after SSH session (skip delete)

skip-ssh.description: Skip SSH wait and session (for testing)

deny-bidder-dids.description: Comma-separated DIDs to exclude from bidding

relay-url.description: Relay URL for bidder discovery via listReposByCollection

offering-firehose-mode.description: Firehose to live-watch for offering records: subscriberepos, jetstream, or off

offering-firehose-url.description: Firehose websocket URL to watch for offering records (relay subscribeRepos base, or jetstream subscribe base)

serve-addr.description: TCP address to bind the requester PDS (only used when --port is set)

serve-unix.description: Unix socket path to serve on (optional, in addition to TCP)

user-data.description: Path to a base cloud-init file; the default websocat/fedproxy-client provisioning is patched into it before the RFP is sent

policy-mode.description: Fulfillment policy mode for the RFP: only_me, direct_network, or policy_based. Omit for no policy (open to all bidders)

pds-state-path.description: Path to persist PDS state (Deno.Kv SQLite file). If set, PDS state survives restarts and prior associations are remembered

no-qr.description: Skip QR code and association confirmation prompt

skip-rbac.description: Skip writing the com.fedproxy.rbac record that authorizes the VM to register its SSH host key
